notes_for_next_session: (1) 2026-06-03 10:00 ET open-market run: ZERO ENTRIES, 0 open positions, account ~$100k healthy (no PDT, no flags). Correct conservative outcome — not a failure. (2) Watchlist was EMPTY again at 10:00 (8:30 premarket trigger still never auto-fired), so I manually re-ran scripts/premarket_scan.py at ~10:08 ET; it succeeded — VIX 16.39, SPY trending up, 25 sentiment-positive momentum names written, daily_context.json refreshed to 2026-06-03. (3) Computed live indicators for all 25 and ran the full entry gate: NONE passed. Dominant blocker rel_vol < 1.5 (23/25) — rel_vol = cumulative IEX 5-min vol / 20d avg daily vol, which reads structurally low early in the session and on the free IEX feed; expect this gate to be the binding constraint on most 10:00 runs unless a name has a real volume surge. Only MCY (2.55) and MBUU (4.0) cleared rel_vol but failed trend/momentum (EMA9<EMA21, RSI low-30s/40s, MACD falling) — pullbacks, not breakouts. (4) For the 12:30 PM agent: no positions to manage; nothing to watch on existing holds. If re-evaluating entries later in the session, rel_vol should rise as cumulative volume builds — watch the same momentum names (esp. NVDA, AAPL, AMZN, AVGO) for an EMA9>EMA21 cross + rising MACD + rel_vol>=1.5 alignment. (5) OPS: the 8:30 ET premarket scan has now failed to auto-fire two sessions running — the open-market agent has had to re-run it manually both times. The schedule/trigger for premarket_scan.py needs a real fix; defaults remain correct (0 indicator_stats samples, no active_parameter_adjustments).
